properties.name: app.upload.dir
properties.description: Base directory for uploaded files (profile images, attachments, etc.). Set APP_UPLOAD_DIR to a persistent-volume mount path in production so files survive redeployments.

properties.name: app.public-base-url
properties.description: Public-facing base URL prepended to uploaded file paths returned to the browser. Set PUBLIC_BASE_URL to the production domain (e.g. https://hms.dev.bitnesttechs.com).

properties.name: app.backend.base-url
properties.description: Backend base URL used as a fallback when building file URLs outside an HTTP request context.

properties.name: app.frontend.base-url
properties.description: Frontend base URL used for links in outbound emails and notifications.

properties.name: app.cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Comma-separated list of allowed CORS origins. Set CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS in production.

properties.name: app.jwt.secret
properties.description: HMAC secret used to sign and verify JWT tokens. Must be at least 256 bits in production.

properties.name: app.jwt.access-token-expiration-ms
properties.description: JWT access token lifetime in milliseconds.

properties.name: app.jwt.refresh-token-expiration-ms
properties.description: JWT refresh token lifetime in milliseconds.

properties.name: app.kafka.chat-topic
properties.description: Kafka topic name for chat messages.

properties.name: app.kafka.empi-identity-topic
properties.description: Kafka topic name for EMPI identity events.

properties.name: app.kafka.patient-movement-topic
properties.description: Kafka topic name for patient movement events.

properties.name: app.kafka.platform-registry-topic
properties.description: Kafka topic name for platform registry events.

properties.name: app.seed.enabled
properties.description: Enable or disable Java-based seed data runners.

properties.name: app.seed.synthetic.enabled
properties.description: Enable or disable synthetic (demo) data seeding.
